title: Scholomance Update Ledger opens on Landing
summary: The entry chamber now carries a twin-gate: Enter on the left, a curated Update Ledger chronicle on the right with DivWand glass and Wand voice.

title: Atomic ledger:add ritual
summary: New entries prepend through npm run ledger:add with fail-closed validation and a temporary-file rename so the chronicle never half-writes.

title: Shared Wand voice tokens
summary: Extracted reusable Wand voice tokens so Update Ledger and other surfaces share one styling source without importing WandPage.css.

title: DivLayoutRenderer extraction
summary: Moved DivWand layout rendering into a shared module so Landing, Combat, and DivWand can share one glass tree without page CSS leakage.

title: CODEx Metrics meet Song Stats
summary: The Read page Metrics panel now draws from the Song Stats engine so lexical density and flow read as one chronicle.

title: Estimated and aligned Flow
summary: Song Stats gained estimated bar-per-line flow plus aligned syncopation versus deviation, with provisional labeling when alignment is thin.

title: Malmi and CODEx rhyme density
summary: Rhyme Density now reports both Malmi RD_M and CODEx RD_C so repetition and span contribute honestly to the score.

title: CODEx lexical diversity
summary: Unique vocabulary now tracks lemma-level diversity with short-sample warnings so thin verses do not pretend to be encyclopedias.

title: Technical Density composite
summary: Song Stats ships a Technical Density band with explicit ceilings and a tooltip that denies artistic-quality claims.

title: Analyze POS buckets and Leximancy
summary: Lexical Analyze groups related words by part of speech and surfaces Leximancy craft actions from the live dictionary graph.

title: OEWN antonym ingest
summary: English WordNet antonyms landed in the Scholomance dictionary so oppositional relations resolve in Analyze and the graph.

title: Lexical graph foundation
summary: SQLite-backed lexical graph routes and retrieval give Analyze a durable neighborhood of synonyms, hypernyms, and kin.

title: Analyze UI retrieval panel
summary: The Analyze surface now retrieves related words live, with loading guards and craft pins so writers can harvest without losing place.

title: Visualizer Truesight amp
summary: Bytecode Visualiser gained Truesight amplification so school color and fidelity ride the stage without inventing a second authority.

title: Mandala bytecode motion
summary: Mandala stage motion now follows deterministic bytecode channels instead of free-running decorative loops.

title: Karaoke bytecode motion
summary: Lyric karaoke highlight timing locks to bytecode motion so the voice and the glyph advance as one rite.

title: Ritual card redesign
summary: Ritual cards were rebuilt for clearer provenance, commerce, and bytecode fingerprints on release surfaces.

title: Tool substrate contract
summary: A shared tool substrate clarifies how Wand, DivWand, and PixelBrain tools declare capabilities without drifting schemas.

title: Discography albums navigation
summary: Album shelves and discography nav make the Visualiser catalog feel like a living library instead of a flat track list.

title: Album page stage
summary: Dedicated album pages host art, lyrics, and transport so each release can be entered as a room.

title: PixelBrain AMP compositor
summary: AMP compositing landed so PixelBrain layers can be stacked and inspected with provenance-preserving transforms.

title: Chroma phosphorylation
summary: Chroma phosphorylation routes school color through a controlled gate so glow follows law instead of whim.

title: Resonance signature contract
summary: Resonance signatures gained a stable contract so Listen, Visualiser, and gear systems share one identity fingerprint.

title: Scholomance game-development skill
summary: Agents now route game asset work through SCDL, PixelBrain, Wand, and DivWand under one repository-native skill contract.

title: Cochlear manifold core
summary: The cochlear manifold core landed so Listen can treat spectral space as a navigable chamber rather than a flat EQ strip.

title: Polaris sonic forest
summary: Polaris Forest gained a sonic walkthrough so the grove answers with light and tone when the path is taken.

title: Portal Warden
summary: Portal Warden watches chamber transitions so entry rites stay coherent across Landing, Read, and the outer gates.

title: Enemy AI council
summary: Combat enemies now deliberate through an AI council so threats choose with purpose instead of pure random aggression.

title: Syntactical combat weave
summary: Spellweave combat ties verse integrity to cast strength so grammar and rhythm become the weapon itself.

title: PicturebookMud HUD fidelity
summary: The PicturebookMud HUD was brought into fidelity with chamber chrome so mud rites match the rest of Scholomance.
